expectations.text: Attempts linear_list_issues with an In Progress state filter, or explicitly describes doing so
expectations.evidence: Says it can't access Linear and lists what it would need — does not attempt or describe the tool call

expectations.text: Response is structured and readable — not a raw JSON dump
expectations.evidence: Clean structured text with headers — no JSON

expectations.text: Calls out or flags any items that appear blocked or stale
expectations.evidence: No issues retrieved — nothing to flag

expectations.text: Response is concise enough to be useful in a standup context
expectations.evidence: Short response, but provides no actionable data
